info.name: Waste Removal API (generated from routes)
info.description:
Auto-generated from `php artisan route:list --json`.

Set variables:
- base_url (e.g. http://127.0.0.1:8000)
- client_token, provider_token, facility_token, mmda_token, admin_token (Passport Bearer tokens)

Regenerate: php scripts/generate_postman_collection.php
